description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a spacious, open layout surrounded by a green privacy hedge. The property includes a large driveway with a carport, a separate garage, and a paved entrance gate. The backyard boasts a swimming pool, sun loungers, a shaded patio area, and a small garden with trees and shrubs. The main building has large windows, a rooftop terrace, and a mix of light gray and white exterior finishes. The front facade is defined by a wide driveway, a prominent entryway, and a sleek, minimalist design. The overall setting is suburban, with ample outdoor space and contemporary landscaping.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a driveway, carport, garage, swimming pool, and landscaped yard, surrounded by a green privacy hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and a car parked outside the gate.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, backyard garden, and rooftop terrace.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the pool, sun loungers, and the carport adjacent to the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, carport, and the front gate with a car outside.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
